productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men Bottom Grey Melange Yoga Pants
description: CompositionGrey yoga capris made of 100% cotton and engineered with spandex, logo imprinted drawstring with soft elastic waist, flattened seam and concealed pockets on the sidesFittingComfortWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Wear these comfort Fit yoga capris to the next yoga session and notice the difference. The softly elasticised drawstring waist can easily be adjusted to your requirement, while the panels on the side give extra stretchability to facilitate easy movement. The deep side pockets can hold your money and keys on the way to the yoga venue. Specially designed with spandex for easy movement, the cotton fabric keeps you dry, comfortable and fresh. Any hard seams like zippers or buttons have been carefully avoided for a comfort feel. The brand tag has been printed and consciously not stitched so that nothing comes between you and comfort. Team this with yoga tees or kurtas for total comfort.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 43"Height-6.2”, Waist – 32”, Hips – 40”
